app.metaHint: Describe your analysis in natural language to generate charts and insights
app.footer: AI Cockpit Event Analytics · Data-driven operations insights

input.placeholder: e.g. Daily Bluetooth usage trend for the last 30 days
input.modeAutoHint: Precise when intent is clear; exploratory when vague
input.modePreciseHint: Run only the single analysis chosen by the LLM
input.modeExploratoryHint: Run all analysis types supported by current data

error.dataNotFoundDetail: Check CSV_DATA_PATH and ensure the data directory contains .csv files.
error.networkDetail: Cannot reach the analysis service. Ensure the backend is running and retry.
error.invalidRequestDetail: Check your input and try again

loading.waitHint: Please wait — the analysis engine is running
tips: Reading your question and locking intent…
Scanning the data pool and event semantics…
LLM shaping metrics and chart blueprints…
Aggregating PV / UV into trends and breakdowns…

dataMgmt.title: Data management
dataMgmt.subtitle: Manage CSV pool and event dictionary; test and edit in place

csv.title: CSV data pool
csv.largeFileHint: · large files may take a while
csv.tooLarge: File too large (max 200 MB per file)
csv.footnote: Uploads are merged into the pool; analysis uses all CSVs in the directory · max 200 MB per file

llm.title: DeepSeek model
llm.subtitle: Affects planning, recommendations, and dashboard copy
llm.hintFlash: Faster responses for daily analysis and recommendations
llm.hintPro: Stronger reasoning for complex queries and caliber notes
llm.switched: Model updated — analysis and recommendations will use the new model

chartTheme.label: Chart colors
chartTheme.paletteHint: Category charts use palette colors; multi-series charts color by series

api.fileTooLarge: File too large (max 200 MB per file)
